content_body: Casa Bella Rio was the perfect vacation spot for us! Very secluded and peaceful, but just minutes away from Blue Ridge! We had an 18 month old with us that loved exploring the grounds, and we felt it was very safe for her. The cabin had a hot tub, fire pit, and a huge patio! The cabin felt brand new, everything was so clean and well appointed. The stars were so bright at night too! Would love to go back! We only spend 4 days there, but could easily spend a week.
title: The Perfect Vacation Spot!
